rows.label: tev060801_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Henahena how she got so big.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060801_MSG0001
rows.name:
Henahena eat hearty helpings of cosse
bean with side of Valley of Oblivionn
will peppers and charupa leaves.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060801_MSG0002
rows.name:
Also rare fruit that only grow
in White Woods called emerald
grape. Lots of emerald grape.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060801_MSG0003
rows.name:
Oh! And Henahena also eat bushel of
bananaleaves from Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060801_MSG0004
rows.name:
Borabora send Henahena every delicacy
found during travels around Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060801_MSG0005
rows.name:
So to answer question of
snoopy friend, Henahena is
big because Henahena is loved![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060801_MSG0010
rows.name:
Milly say she still not have boyfriend
because BLADE work keep Milly so busy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060801_MSG0011
rows.name:
But if you ask Henahena, that is
just big excuse! Mo, please![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060801_MSG0012
rows.name:
Real reason Milly cannot get boyfriend is because
Milly is too skinny. Once she get to size of
Henahena, boyfriends will be lining up out door.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060801_MSG0013
rows.name:
Henahena better start swapping
tastier, fattier foods in place
of yucky rations of Milly.[ST:wait ]
